Question: Emergency signs (checkbox list)
Possible Answers: Hypoglycemia | Bleeding | Severe resp distress | Cyanosis | CRT>3s | etc.

Question: Priority signs (checkbox list)
Possible Answers: Low birth weight | Respiratory distress | Prematurity | Fever | Birth trauma | Severe pallor | etc.

Question: Resuscitation methods
Possible Answers: Supplemental oxygen | Ventilation bag | Intubation | Heart massage
